interpretation: Resolution changes the raster support and therefore derivative values; this comparison is descriptive only.
Smoothing changes local gradients and focal derivatives; it is a documented preprocessing choice rather than a correction for survey artifacts.
Sign conversion preserves gradient magnitudes but reverses elevation-like local-position and Laplacian-sign interpretations.

observed_change: Raster CRS is longitude/latitude; corridor width may be misleading.
interpretation: A numeric corridor width in a geographic CRS is angular, not metres; the package warning documents this limitation.
